subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the love of God! Render a hundredfold thanks unto God, for thou hast been guided by the lights of the fire of the blessed Tree in the Sinai of the divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب محبت الله صد شکر کن خدا را که بانوار نار شجره طوبی در سدره سیناء راه
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
